name: Coconut Mismo
description: A simple highball cocktail of BACARDÍ Coconut rum and soda water served over ice and finished with lime. BACARDÍ Coconut gives the Mismo a smooth tropical kick.
ingredients: Fill a tall highball glass with cubed ice. ice
Garnish with a lime wedge. lime wedge
recipe_steps: Fill a tall highball glass with cubed ice.
Add the soda water and stir well before serving.
searchable_text: Coconut Mismo main rum BACARDÍ Coconut rum A simple highball cocktail of BACARDÍ Coconut rum and soda water served over ice and finished with lime. BACARDÍ Coconut gives the Mismo a smooth tropical kick. ingredients Fill a tall highball glass with cubed ice. ice, 50 ml BACARDÍ Coconut rum, 150 ml soda water, Garnish with a lime wedge. lime wedge recipe steps Fill a tall highball glass with cubed ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Coconut. Add the soda water and stir well before serving. Garnish with a lime wedge.
